name: Perfect Pancakes
description: Make perfectly light, fluffy, golden pancakes every time with our easy one-bowl recipe. It's the perfect pancake recipe!

author.name: Rachel Farnsworth
author.description: Rachel Farnsworth, founder of The Stay At Home Chef, is a culinary powerhouse whose passion for cooking began at a young age and has grown into an influential online presence. Known for her barefoot cooking and love for using everyday ingredients, Rachel’s recipes are celebrated worldwide. Despite her severe illness in recent years, her spirit remains undeterred, and she continues to inspire millions of followers to create restaurant-quality meals at home through her recipes, insights, and easy-to-follow video tutorials.

publisher.name: The Stay At Home Chef
publisher.description: Restaurant quality recipes you can easily make at home.

recipeInstructions.text: In a large mixing bowl, sift together flour, sugar baking powder, baking soda, and salt.
Whisk in milk, eggs, and melted butter just until combined.
Preheat a flat griddle over medium-high heat.
Scoop 1/4 cup of pancake batter onto griddle. Let pancakes cook until bubbles form before flipping.
Cook other side until golden brown. Serve hot with syrup.
